name: io.github.danboabes/mcpdomain
description: The first domain registrar built for AI agents. Check availability, suggest names, register domains, configure email forwarding, and manage DNS — all through MCP tools that AI assistants can call directly inside conversations.
title: MCPDomain

environmentVariables.name: OPENSRS_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Operation mode: 'mock' for testing (default) or 'live' for real OpenSRS API calls

environmentVariables.name: OPENSRS_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: OpenSRS reseller username (only required in live mode)

environmentVariables.name: OPENSRS_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenSRS API key (only required in live mode)

remotes.description: Hosted MCPDomain MCP server. No installation required — connect any MCP-compatible client directly. Free for read-only tools (check_domain_availability, suggest_available_domains). Authenticated tools require an MCPDomain account.

tools.name: check_domain_availability
tools.description: Check whether a specific internet domain (like 'example.com') is available for registration. Returns availability status, registration price, the TLD, and up to 3 close alternatives if the domain is taken. Free, no authentication required.

tools.name: suggest_available_domains
tools.description: Generate creative domain name suggestions from a business description, brand idea, or keywords, then verify each suggestion is available in real-time. Returns a ranked list of available domains with prices. Free, no authentication required.

tools.name: register_new_domain
tools.description: Initiate registration of a new domain on behalf of the user. Returns a Stripe checkout URL for payment. After payment, the domain is registered with free email forwarding, free DNS, and AI bot monitoring included.

tools.name: configure_domain_email
tools.description: Set up email forwarding for a registered domain. Forward all emails (catch-all) or specific aliases (sales@, support@) to existing inboxes like Gmail or Outlook. No MX record configuration needed.

tools.name: configure_domain_dns
tools.description: Add or update DNS records (A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, SRV) for a registered domain. Use to point the domain at hosting providers or set up third-party verifications.

tools.name: get_my_domain_details
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about a registered domain: status, DNS records, email forwards, expiry, and a unique 30-day report of which AI bots crawled the domain.

tools.name: transfer_existing_domain
tools.description: Initiate the transfer of a domain from another registrar (GoDaddy, Namecheap, etc.) to MCPDomain. Requires the EPP authorization code from the current registrar.
